name: reputation_check
description: Onchain ERC-8004 reputation report for any AI agent. Returns trust score, feedback count, category breakdown, peer ranking, and cross-chain presence. Data sourced live from 8004scan across 45+ chains. Unique to ACK: real onchain reputation signals, not marketplace metrics.

agent.description: Agent name, token ID (e.g. '606'), or chain:id (e.g. '2741:606')

chain.description: Optional chain filter: abstract, base, ethereum, celo (default: all)
